title: PastelJEI
description: An addon to Pastel that adds JEI support.
body:
PastelJEI is an addon to Pastel that adds support for viewing recipes in Just Enough Items.

In addition to all REI/EMI features that Pastel provides, this mod also adds:
• Separate categories for different Pedestal tiers
• Pedestal recipe transfer for Crafting Tablets

For EMI support, please directly use the base mod.
